File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer name as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Global People IT-Services GmbH as customer

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer address as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Kärntner Ring 12, A-1010 Vienna, Austria

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer VAT number as customer on supplier invoice
Exception for flights/bookings where Local Employer name not possible
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Worker's name acceptable when Local Employer name not possible, not end client
Local currency with FX rate calculation
Must be clearly stated on receipt
Must be actual tax receipts or invoices, not booking confirmations
Online copies sufficient, hard copy not required
Any personal information not required for reimbursement must be removed
Submit separate report for each trip
Must use Travel Expense Report Template Austria EUR.xlsx
Map with relevant route (Google Maps sufficient)
Record of kilometers traveled must be submitted
Parking tickets should be included within the mileage payment

Compliance_Policies.Description: General business expenses for job completion
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Usually tax exempt, grossed up if not tax free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide sufficient proof like tax receipts or invoices

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Follow specific tax allowances and rules
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must follow specific tax allowances found at government website
Receipt alone is not enough - you must get approval from your direct manager

Compliance_Policies.Description: Private vehicles, motorbikes, bicycles for work
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Maximum €0.42 per km, capped at €12,600 annually
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must provide map with route (Google Maps sufficient), record of kilometers, car details, and use travel template

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Should be included within mileage payment, taxed if paid separately
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - parking tickets should be included within mileage payment

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Maximum €30 per day (€2.50/hour for 3-12 hours), capped at €26.40 mentioned in document
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must use travel report template and cannot mix per diem with actual expenses

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free per diem covers meals, reduced by 50% if meals provided
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - per diem method covers meals

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Paid separately with proper invoice/receipt or €17
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - provide proper invoice/receipt or accept €17 flat rate

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Per diem rates set by government for each destination
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must use travel report template and cannot mix per diem with actual expenses

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free based on government limits per destination, can be increased with receipts
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - for amounts above government rate, you must submit receipts

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: If lunch and dinner provided, per diem reduced
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - automatic reduction applies

Compliance_Policies.Description: Non-per diem expenses for international travel
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Expenses outside per diem paid against receipts
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for expenses outside per diem

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Cannot mix per diem method with actual expenses

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer name must appear on invoices
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Hotel and flight bookings where company name not possible
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's name on invoice WHEN company name cannot be used for hotel and flight bookings (not end client)

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer address must appear on invoices
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Hotel and flight bookings where company address not applicable
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's personal address on invoice WHEN worker books personal hotel/flight (logical extension of name exception)

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer VAT number must appear on invoices
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Hotel and flight bookings where company VAT not applicable
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept absence of company VAT number (ATU77112189) WHEN worker makes personal hotel/flight bookings (logical extension of name exception)

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Choose either per diem OR actual expenses
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Per Diem - Meals vs Meal Receipt - Actual
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reject mixed methods - IF per diem chosen THEN no actual meal receipts accepted for that specific trip (must agree on one method)
OVERRIDE: Do not require receipts BUT require map with route (Google Maps sufficient), kilometer record, car details, and travel template
OVERRIDE: Include parking in tickets within mileage payment - IF paid separately THEN parking will be taxed
OVERRIDE: Require direct manager approval for ALL training expenses regardless of job relevance

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Per diem available for all domestic travel
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Only allow per diem entitlement WHEN travel exceeds 25 kilometers from place of business
OVERRIDE: Accept €15 flat rate without receipt OR proper invoice/receipt for actual costs
OVERRIDE: Reduce per diem by 50% WHEN meals are provided by employer/host

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Per diems at government rates are tax-free
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: International travel with increased per diem
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Allow increased per diem rates BUT require receipts for amounts above government rate AND tax excess amount

Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Lunch and dinner provided on international trips
Austria_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reduce per diem by two-thirds WHEN lunch AND dinner are provided (breakfast not considered)
OVERRIDE: Require receipts submitted in same currency WITH clear exchange rate calculation
